tooltips.the_vault:living: <green>This item will level up when levelling up from completing a vault.
tooltips.the_vault:armor: Increases your damage reduction by adding armor points, the more the merrier.
tooltips.the_vault:ability_power: Ability Power is used to calculate damage from certain, usually magical, abilities.
tooltips.the_vault:critical_hit_mitigation: Most non horde mobs in the game has a chance to deal critical damage, this affix acts as a chance to dodge a critical hit.
tooltips.the_vault:mana_additive: Adds mana points to your total mana pool.
tooltips.the_vault:block: Blocking an incoming attack will completely neglect any damage from that attack, a shield is needed for Block Chance to have effect.
tooltips.the_vault:health: Adds hitpoints to your total health pool, one hitpoint is half a minecraft heart.
tooltips.the_vault:health_additive: Increases your current hitpoints by adding a percentage of what you currently have, on top of your hitpoints.
tooltips.the_vault:mana_additive_percentile: Increases your current mana pool, by adding a percentage of what you currently have, on top of your mana pool.
tooltips.the_vault:resistance: Adds a layer of protection on top of your armor, reducing damage with a percentage, including magic damage against you.
tooltips.the_vault:damage_increase: Increases any physical damage dealt by a percentage based on your total attack damage value.
tooltips.the_vault:ability_power_percent: Increases your total Ability Power by a percentage based on your total ability power value.
tooltips.the_vault:knockback_resistance: Lowers the amount of knockback you get from being damaged by any source, 100% would make you not become knocked back at all.
tooltips.the_vault:effect_list_avoidance: Gives you a chance to avoid negative effects, they include: Fire, Poison, Slowness, Blindness, Hunger, Bleed, Faituge and Freezing.
tooltips.the_vault:movement_speed: Increases your movement speed, including run and walk speed, by a percentage.
tooltips.the_vault:durability: Increases the life time of an item by adding more durability points.
tooltips.the_vault:cooldown_reduction: Lowers the time you have to wait for an ability to be cast again after casting it.
tooltips.the_vault:effect_duration: Increases the duration of any and all effects you cast or apply, for example can extend the length of a cloud effect from your weapon.
tooltips.the_vault:healing_effectiveness: Increases the amount of healing received with a percentage when getting healed by any source, including potions and regeneration.
tooltips.the_vault:mana_regen: Increases the speed at which your mana recovers with a percentage addition. 100% Equals 1 mana per second, 200% Equals 2 mana per second, etc.
tooltips.the_vault:attack_damage: Adds damage points to any physical attacks carried out.
tooltips.the_vault:attack_speed: How many fully charged attacks can be made per second.
tooltips.the_vault:sweeping_hit_damage: How much of your physical damage is transfered to the sweeping area of your sword (mobs within a 3 block line in front of you when attacking).
tooltips.the_vault:hit_hearts: The chance of spawning a heart fragment when killing a mob, which can be picked up to instantly heal the player for 1 hitpoint.
tooltips.the_vault:soul_chance: Multiplies the amount of soul shards dropped by mobs when killed by the player.
tooltips.the_vault:damage_champion: Increases physical and ability power damage to Champion type mobs
tooltips.the_vault:damage_horde: Increases physical and ability power damage to Horde type mobs
tooltips.the_vault:damage_tank: Increases physical and ability power damage to Tank type mobs
tooltips.the_vault:damage_assassin: Increases physical and ability power damage to Assassin type mobs
tooltips.the_vault:damage_dweller: Increases physical and ability power damage to Dweller type mobs
tooltips.the_vault:damage_dungeon: Increases physical and ability power damage to Dungeon type mobs
tooltips.the_vault:on_hit_chain: Adds a chain from the first target hit a number of times based on your Chaining value, each chain lowers the damage by 25% of your initial hit.
tooltips.the_vault:lucky_hit_chance: Your chance at landing a Lucky Hit, increasing physical damage on that strike, and triggering any talent tied to Lucky Hit.
